subject: v2-S04 iter 8: protocol rewrite (overlap-matched constellation + TPS NCC search + 4-panel figs)
description:
New protocol per user 2026-04-29:
1. After LP, build matched cz↔gfp pairs scored by centroid distance AND ROI IoU.
2. Constellation = enumerate K∈{4,5,6} subsets of top-N candidates; for each, fit TPS (CZ→HCR), score by registered NCC over local volume = hull + small margin. Two NCC variants: cz binary ROI vs 488 raw, AND cz image vs 488 raw. Pick max.
3. LOO NCC for chosen constellation = per-landmark validity.
4. 4-panel figure per subject: (488+GFP white) | (GFP+CZ contours before TPS) | (GFP+CZ contours after TPS) | (488 + CZ after TPS).
